reviewer_notes: Fixture contains redacted structure only and no private DevHub values.
Consequential DevHub controls are recorded only as disabled guardrail metadata.
abort_prompts: Abort if credentials, MFA, CAPTCHA, account creation, cookies, auth state, screenshots, traces, HAR files, private values, uploads, submissions, payments, scheduling, cancellation, or certification are requested.
Do not store local paths, raw authenticated page text, downloads, browser artifacts, or session artifacts.

reviewer_notes: Only landmark names and structural labels are retained.
abort_prompts: Do not open account settings, credential management, or private message bodies.
